name: met-font
description: WMO weather symbols as an emoji-style font

scripts.prepare-fonts: python3 helpers/combine-svg-paths.py --input-dir src/ && python3 helpers/normalize-svg.py --input-dir src/ --mapping data/codepoint-map.json --output-dir color/svg/
scripts.generate-glyphs: python3 site/extract-glyphs.py index > site/public/glyphs.json && python3 site/extract-glyphs.py metadata > site/public/glyph-metadata.json && cp data/plane-info.json site/public/ && cp data/category-descriptions.json site/public/
scripts.dev: npm run generate-glyphs && npm run copy-fonts && cd site && npm run dev
scripts.build:site: npm run generate-glyphs && npm run copy-fonts && cd site && npm run build
